heading: Coverage of dependent students on medically necessary leave of absence
label: 9813 Coverage of dependent students on medically necessary leave of absence
notes: References in TextSection 102 of the Higher Education Act of 1965, referred to in subsec. (a), is classified to , Education.section 1002 of Title 20

children.heading: Medically necessary leave of absence
children.label: a Medically necessary leave of absence

children.text: commences while such child is suffering from a serious illness or injury;
causes such child to lose student status for purposes of coverage under the terms of the plan or coverage.

children.label: A
children.text: the date that is 1 year after the first day of the medically necessary leave of absence; or

children.label: B
children.text: the date on which such coverage would otherwise terminate under the terms of the plan.

children.label: A
children.text: is a dependent child, under the terms of the plan, of a participant or beneficiary under the plan; and

children.label: B
children.text: was enrolled in the plan, on the basis of being a student at a postsecondary educational institution (as described in subsection (a)), immediately before the first day of the medically necessary leave of absence involved.

children.heading: Certification by physician
children.label: 3 Certification by physician
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall apply to a group health plan only if the plan, or the issuer of health insurance coverage offered in connection with the plan, has received written certification by a treating physician of the dependent child which states that the child is suffering from a serious illness or injury and that the leave of absence (or other change of enrollment) described in subsection (a) is medically necessary.

children.heading: Notice
children.label: c Notice
children.text: A group health plan shall include, with any notice regarding a requirement for certification of student status for coverage under the plan, a description of the terms of this section for continued coverage during medically necessary leaves of absence. Such description shall be in language which is understandable to the typical plan participant.

children.heading: No change in benefits
children.label: d No change in benefits
children.text: A dependent child whose benefits are continued under this section shall be entitled to the same benefits as if (during the medically necessary leave of absence) the child continued to be a covered student at the institution of higher education and was not on a medically necessary leave of absence.

children.heading: Continued application in case of changed coverage
children.label: e Continued application in case of changed coverage

children.text: a dependent child of a participant or beneficiary is in a period of coverage under a group health plan, pursuant to a medically necessary leave of absence of the child described in subsection (b);

the manner in which the participant or beneficiary is covered under the plan changes, whether through a change in health insurance coverage or health insurance issuer, a change between health insurance coverage and self-insured coverage, or otherwise; and
the coverage as so changed continues to provide coverage of beneficiaries as dependent children,
